fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 61 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly considers an item valid when the current time is exactly equal to its expiry time. The comparison should be greater-than-or-equal-to (`>=`) to correctly treat such items as expired.

constraints.intent: The expiry check should handle the `now == ttl` boundary case correctly.
A valid cache item must be a tuple of two elements (payload and TTL).
The calculated effective TTL must be a non-negative timestamp.

spec.expr: implies(key in cache and cache.get(key) is not None and now >= cache.get(key)[1], __cbfl_result is None)

constraints.intent: An item at or beyond its expiry time must not be returned.
